inventoryMethod: Amount after valuation and LIFO reserves of inventory expected to be sold, or consumed within one year or operating cycle, if longer.

numericFacts.label: Revenue from Contract with Customer, Excluding Assessed Tax

narrativeSnippets: Sum of the carrying amounts as of the balance sheet date of all assets that are recognized. Assets are probable future economic benefits obtained or controlled by an entity as a result of past transactions or events.

Amount of obligation to transfer good or service to customer for which consideration has been received or is receivable, classified as current.
Total costs related to goods produced and sold during the reporting period.
The aggregate cost of goods produced and sold and services rendered during the reporting period.
